offer: For logistics carriers processing 50–100 shipments/week, slow inventory turnover reporting causes stockouts and delayed shipments. We streamline report generation instead of manual reporting from ERP systems.
problem: Inability to quickly assess inventory turnover leads to stockouts and delayed shipments.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics carriers
Indie Hackers posts about inventory management tools
DM outreach to logistics carriers with demo video
Community forums for logistics carriers sharing solutions
try_it: Let users try Weekly report generation and Customizable report templates on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
